name: Strigoi: The Vampire Legend
short_description: Strigoi is a first-person horror shooter set in the Carpathian Mountains. You will face various enemies (Vampires, Strigoi...), encounter interesting puzzles, and find different items that will help you overcome obstacles and enemies.
detailed_description:
"We, my sister and I, have long lived abroad, together with the longing for our homeland. Not long ago, we received an invitation to a party in Romania, in the Carpathians. My sister, without hesitation, got into the car and left. I refused to go, but after some time I received a terrifying message from my sister. Frightened, I dropped everything and quickly set out to find her. I wonder what happened?"

Strigoi is a first-person horror shooter set in the Carpathian Mountains. You will face various enemies (Vampires, Strigoi...), encounter interesting puzzles, and find different items that will help you overcome obstacles and enemies.

Game Features:

  • A semi-open world with various interesting locations such as Mountains, Dungeons, a Village, Graveyards, an Abandoned Castle, and more.

  • Dangerous and terrifying enemies for whom you are merely food and an unwelcome guest.

  • A deep storyline where you must unravel the mysteries of this world.

  • A game world filled with dangers, including not only enemies but also traps and puzzles.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
